home.location_desc:
Free pick-up in Belgium (Grimbergen & Watermael-Boisfort) or directly in Cotonou, Benin.
Home delivery available in Belgium and across Europe.
home.about_p1: Les Poulettes is an eco-responsible accessories brand born between Belgium and Benin. We handcraft pouches, bags and laptop sleeves in authentic African wax fabric. Every piece is unique, made by our Beninese seamstresses with care and passion.
home.about_p2: Our mission: to promote local know-how, support our artisans and offer durable, elegant and environmentally conscious accessories.
home.event_quote: Every event deserves unique creations that tell your story and celebrate your precious moments.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: An artisan brand born in Benin, driven by a passion for wax
about.hero_subtitle: A brand born from a passion for wax fabric and a family legacy, carried by two women united by a love of craftsmanship.
about.story_p1: Les Poulettes is a wax accessories brand, but above all a story of passion and heritage.
about.story_p2: In 2017, the brand was born in Benin with the desire to create pieces from wax — that vibrant, colourful fabric full of meaning.
about.story_p3: At the start, Les Poulettes was a solo adventure, driven by creativity and inspired by a precious legacy: a seamstress mother who passed on her love of thread, fabric and meticulous work. It was this mother who called (and still calls!) her daughters 'mes poulettes' — the name came naturally.
about.story_p4: After a pause, the adventure resumed in 2025 with renewed energy. Les Poulettes was reborn and grew with the arrival of a young Beninese seamstress, motivated and full of potential. Together, we combine creativity, energy and high standards to create polished, vibrant wax accessories for everyday life.
about.story_p5: Les Poulettes is a small adventure that keeps growing. It's the desire to create colourful, practical wax accessories made with care and above all with heart. Pieces that bring a little joy to everyday life, simply.
about.val1_desc: Every pouch, bag and sleeve is cut and sewn by hand. No industrial production — only the patient, precise work of two skilled and passionate hands.
about.val2_desc: We work with quality wax fabrics from local short supply chains. Our packaging is minimalist and recyclable. Every production choice is made to minimise our environmental impact.
about.val3_desc: Every purchase directly supports our Beninese seamstress and helps this adventure grow. We believe in fashion that creates value where it is made — not just where it is sold.
about.val4_desc: We carefully select our wax fabrics — for their patterns, structure and authenticity. African wax is much more than a fabric: it is a language, a tradition, an identity.
about.val5_desc: Every creation is unique. Fabrics vary from one collection to the next, patterns evolve with the seasons. Your Les Poulettes accessory is like no other — and that is its charm.
about.val6_desc: Wedding, baby shower, birthday, corporate event... We create personalised accessories to make your occasion unforgettable. Contact us for a quote.
about.atelier_p1: Our workshop is in Cotonou, in the heart of Benin. That is where everything begins: selecting fabrics at local markets, drawing patterns, precise cutting, assembling stitch by stitch.
about.atelier_p2: Our Beninese seamstress works with care and precision, bringing her talent and energy to each piece. No industrial machines — just skilled hands, a sewing machine and a great love of craftsmanship.
about.atelier_p3: The result? Solid, durable pieces with attention to detail that you can see and feel from the very first use.
about.impact_sub: Behind every accessory are two passionate women and a real story. Buying Les Poulettes means choosing fashion that has a real human impact.
about.cta_title: Ready to fall for a unique piece?
about.cta_sub: Browse our shop or contact us for a custom order.
